'''Deak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] non-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] pilot in the resurrected [[Kyp's Dozen]] squadron.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In early drafts of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Star Wars]], [[Deak Starkiller]] was the ten year old brother of [[Annikin Starkiller]], who would become [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in later drafts.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
